problem id: d9cd73c2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00101101 -> 10101011
  00011000 -> 00000110
  10001011 -> 01000010
  01110110 -> 11011101
  10000000 -> 00100000
  11101010 -> 01111010
  10001101 -> 10000011
  11000111 -> 11010001

query: 10100111
predicted answer: 11001001
